resources.string: Jump with legs spread and hands touching overhead. Great cardio.
Keep feet shoulder-width apart and back straight. Sit back.
Hold a straight line from head to heels on your forearms.
Lower your chest to the floor and push back up. Keep core tight.
Step forward and lower your hips until both knees are bent at $90^\circ$.
In a plank position, drive your knees toward your chest fast.
Gentle full-body stretching. Focus on breathing.
Run in place while lifting your knees as high as possible.
Lie on your back and lift your hips toward the ceiling.
Lift your upper body slightly using your core. Don\'t pull your neck.
Stand facing a wall and push away. Easier on the joints.
Step backward and lower your knee. Better for knee stability.
Lie on your stomach, lift arms and legs off the floor.
On all fours, alternate between arching and rounding your back.
Drop to a squat, jump to plank, jump back, and leap up.
Wide stance with toes pointed out. Targets inner thighs.
Balance on one forearm and the side of your foot.
Like jumping jacks, but cross your arms and legs in front.
Use a chair or bench to lower and lift your body.
Lie on your back and lift straight legs to a $90^\circ$ angle.
Kneel and sit on your heels, stretching your arms forward.
Stand in a stance and throw fast, controlled punches.
Step to the side and bend one knee while keeping the other straight.
In a high plank, tap your opposite shoulder with your hand.
On all fours, extend opposite arm and leg simultaneously.
Mimic the motion of jumping rope. Great for calves.
Lean your back against a wall in a seated position. Hold it!
Bring opposite elbow to opposite knee in a cycling motion.
Perform mountain climbers slowly to focus on core control.
Perform 1 minute of your 5 favorite exercises from the list!
